---
title: "Zeckendorf Folds, Sturmian Rigidity, and Parry Divergence on the Golden-Mean Shift"
subtitle: "Ergodic theory and symbolic dynamics"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, ergodic, submitted]
journal: "Ergodic Theory and Dynamical Systems"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram"
theorems: 46
featured: false
description: "The canonical Zeckendorf fold on the Sturmian slice is bijective and realizes the higher-block presentation, giving an exact KL formula and sharp support-constrained Renyi minima in closed form...."
---

## Abstract

The canonical Zeckendorf fold on the Sturmian slice is bijective and realizes the higher-block presentation, giving an exact KL formula and sharp support-constrained Renyi minima in closed form.

**Keywords:** Sturmian subshifts, Zeckendorf numeration, golden-mean shift, Parry measure, Renyi divergence

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Machine-verified theorems | 46 |
| Target journal | Ergodic Theory and Dynamical Systems |
| Status | Submitted |
| Scope | Ergodic theory and symbolic dynamics |

## Video Explainer

*Video coming soon --- NotebookLM pipeline ready, YouTube upload pending.*

## Links

- [Full Paper (GitHub)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram)
- [Lean 4 Proofs](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
